title: Elicit – sleep deprivation
query: What are the effects of sleep deprivation on cognitive performance?

answer.text: Sleep deprivation significantly impairs cognitive performance across multiple domains. Working memory and attention are particularly vulnerable.

paragraphs.text: Sleep deprivation significantly impairs cognitive performance across multiple domains.
Working memory and attention are particularly vulnerable.

citations.title: The impact of sleep deprivation on decision making
Altered brain response to verbal learning following sleep deprivation
